title: lycopodium selago f. occidentale
intro: Lycopodium selago f. occidentale, also known as club moss, is a plant species in the Lycopodiaceae family, characterized by its small, scale-like leaves and tall, branching stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lycopodium selago f. occidentale include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and ease pain. Lycopodium selago f. occidentale is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion for herbal use, often in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
